name: ACRES Commercial Realty Corp. 7.875% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: ACRES Commercial Realty Corp. is a commercial real estate finance company that originates and manages commercial real estate loans and other investments. The 7.875% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock represents a preferred equity interest in the company. ACRES Commercial Realty Corp. is headquartered in Jericho, NY.
